framework.name: Error Amplification at Scale
framework.description: Automated systems don't just make errors—they amplify them at machine speed. Toyota's $5B recall as physical analog for what biased AI models or flawed algorithms do digitally.
framework.raw_quote: When an error occurs, that same system becomes a massive error amplifier, multiplying the mistake at scale until a skilled human operator intervenes.

source.title: The Automation Paradox: Why AI Needs More Human Expertise, Not ...
